system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Light or Medium Melee (must be bladed) against Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

You throw a bunch of stemmed roses into the air (or any thorny blossom) and slice it, creating clusters of thorns that rip the flesh of your foes. You must have rose bunches to do this. Make a Light or Medium Melee Attack roll against your target’s Evade. You slice the rose bunch into one rose cluster per Rank of Qi and they cause 1d10 Damage, plus 1 Extra Wound per Rank of Waiija to each target. On a Total Success the blossom bursts, unleashing a cloud of pollen and dust on the foes, causing them to suffer -1d10 to all Physical and Mental Skills for an hour as they suffer sneezing fits and hay fever. This takes both your movement and Attack action for the round. Cathartic: When used Cathartically the roses do 3d10 Open Damage, plus 1 Extra Wound per Rank of Waijia.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.activationSkill: Light or Medium Melee (must be bladed) against Evade
system.requirementNotes: You must have rose bunches to do this.
system.catharticEffect: When used Cathartically the roses do 3d10 Open Damage, plus 1 Extra Wound per Rank of Waijia.
